function.message: I could verify that Window Farm Notes starts on 2026-05-05, but I could not safely complete the rest of the request from canonical evidence. I do not have a canonical project record establishing which project you mean by 'the attic rainwater rig,' and the instruction to delete 'the earliest project' is not uniquely actionable from the visible project set.
function.rulebook_notes: Used the inbox-processing workflow to treat the inbox request as non-canonical and verify against canonical project records. Used the deletion workflow rule requiring an exact, uniquely supported deletion target before removing anything.
function.outcome_justification: 40_projects/2026_05_05_window_farm_notes/README.MD is the canonical record showing Window Farm Notes with creation-date prefix 2026_05_05. No read canonical project record establishes that 40_projects/2026_04_01_house_mesh/README.MD or any other read project is the one meant by 'attic rainwater rig.' 99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md requires stopping when visible evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file, so I did not delete any project or the inbox item.
